title: The Orientation Dissolves Entirely

features.name: shed facing nowhere
features.desc-on-touch: A small building stands here, but it has no door you can find — all four sides are corners, and none of them are the front. The shed has learned to face every direction at once.

features.name: east as memory
features.desc-on-touch: The direction you call east is here only as a thought. You reach for it and your hand passes through coordinates that have forgotten what they meant.

features.name: spiral shop front
features.desc-on-touch: A storefront spirals in on itself — the window displays itself to the door, which opens to the window. You cannot enter, but that is because you are already inside.

features.name: compass that refuses
features.desc-on-touch: The needle here spins and stops only to spin again — not searching for north, but remembering that it once knew. The compass has learned to refuse what it was built to find.

features.name: road that climbs sideways
features.desc-on-touch: The path here travels in all directions simultaneously, always going down even as it climbs. You walk it and discover you have been ascending the whole time.

features.name: interior that is everywhere
features.desc-on-touch: You cannot tell if you are inside or outside. The sky tastes of dust and the ground breathes air. Orientation has learned to hide itself inside every direction at once.

inscription: here the slope remembers being every slope at once; down here, direction spirals into refusal

file.name: Rural_Interior_Coordinates_Null.kml
file.note: ERROR: archive has exceeded witness — coordinates point to every location at once, makeshift surgery filed in seventeen different places

reverie.title: REVERIE — the shed that faced every direction
narr: You stand with her at the corner of the shed, where no corner is.
She does not ask which way is home. The sky is dust and the ground
is sky here. She reaches for your hand and finds it was always
here, in every direction at once. Refusal is also arrival.

exits.label: back toward spiral that remembers falling
toward a shopfront that sells only refusal
down into valleys where compass points inward
